# jupiterone_control_framework (Resource)

A custom control framework.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "jupiterone_control_framework" "example" {
  name        = "My Custom Control Framework"
  description = "A custom control framework for our security program"
  owner       = "security@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the control framework

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the control framework
- `owner` (String) The owner of the framework (must be the email address of an active JupiterOne user)
- `resource_group_id` (String) The resource group ID to scope the framework to

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
